# scm_globalprotect_match_list (Data Source)

GlobalprotectMatchList data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the globalprotect match list by its ID.
data "scm_globalprotect_match_list" "globalprotect_match_list_ds" {
  id = "89c5fc2d-dba8-4560-b853-4eb1ecd36025"
}

# Output the details of the globalprotect match list
output "globalprotect_match_list_data_source_results" {
  description = "The details of the globalprotect match list object read from the data source."
  value       = data.scm_globalprotect_match_list.globalprotect_match_list_ds
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource

### Optional

- `device` (String) The device in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.
- `folder` (String) The folder in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.
- `name` (String) Name of the globalprotect match list entry
- `snippet` (String) The snippet in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the globalprotect match list entry
- `filter` (String) Filter of the globalprotect match list entry
- `quarantine` (Boolean) Quarantine Flag of the globalprotect match list entry
- `send_email` (List of String) Send Email List of the globalprotect match list entry
- `send_http` (List of String) Send HTTP List of the globalprotect match list entry
- `send_snmptrap` (List of String) Send SNMP Trap List of the globalprotect match list entry
- `send_syslog` (List of String) Send Sys log List of the globalprotect match list entry
- `send_to_panorama` (Boolean) Send to Panorama Flag of the globalprotect match list entry
- `tfid` (String) The Terraform ID.
